name: ossie
description: Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data
readme_excerpt: Apache Ossie is a collaborative, open-source effort dedicated to standardizing and streamlining semantic model exchange and utilization across the diverse array of tools and platforms within the data analytics, AI, and BI ecosystem. Our shared vision is to establish a common, vendor-agnostic semantic model specification, promoting unparalleled interoperability, efficiency, and collaboration among all participants. By providing a single, consistent source of truth, this vendor-agnostic standard e…

name: stitch-skills
description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
readme_excerpt: A collection of agent skills and plugins for Google Stitch, following the Agent Skills open standard. Compatible with coding agents such as Codex, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, and Cursor.

name: hallmark
description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
readme_excerpt: **A design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex that refuses to look AI-generated.**

name: DesktopCommanderMCP
description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
readme_excerpt: Work with code and text, run processes, and automate tasks, going far beyond other AI editors - while using host client subscriptions instead of API token costs.

name: OpenCut
description: The open-source CapCut alternative
readme_excerpt: **OpenCut is being rewritten from the ground up.** What's coming:

name: abseil-cpp
description: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)
readme_excerpt: The repository contains the Abseil C++ library code. Abseil is an open-source collection of C++ code (compliant to C++17) designed to augment the C++ standard library.

name: posthog
description: :hedgehog: PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.
readme_excerpt: PostHog provides every tool you need to build a successful product, and captures all the context agents need to proactively diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes:

name: openinterpreter
description: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
readme_excerpt: Then type i or interpreter in your terminal to start a session.

name: Vibe-Trading
description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent"
readme_excerpt: - **2026-07-16** 🔧 **Dependency lock repaired + Windows settings save fix**: the hash-verified runtime lock is regenerated so Docker's pip install --require-hashes resolves cleanly again, fixing the incompatible caio/pydantic-core/websockets pins (#564, closes #558, thanks @tianrking). Saving Agent LLM settings from the Web UI no longer returns HTTP 500 on Windows — the POSIX-only os.fchmod hardening is now platform-guarded, with a regression test for platforms without fchmod (#561, thanks @CRui…

name: Bonsai-demo
description: Bonsai Demo
readme_excerpt: Using this demo repository you can run **Bonsai** (1-bit) and **Ternary-Bonsai** language models locally on Mac (Metal), Linux/Windows (CUDA, Vulkan, ROCm), or CPU.

name: asio
description: Asio C++ Library
readme_excerpt: Visit https://think-async.com/ or see packaged doc/index.html for API documentation and a tutorial.

name: exercises-dataset
description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.
readme_excerpt: **A comprehensive, ready-to-use fitness exercise dataset with 1,324 exercises — each with an animation GIF, 180×180 thumbnail image, category, body-part, equipment, target and muscle-group data, and step-by-step instructions in 10 languages (English, Spanish, Italian, Turkish, Russian, Chinese, Hindi, Polish, Korean, French).**

name: orca
description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
readme_excerpt: Run Codex, ClaudeCode, OpenCode or Pi side-by-side — each in its own worktree, tracked in one place.

name: awesome-llm-apps
description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
readme_excerpt: **100+ open-source AI agents, agent skills, and RAG apps. Hand-built, tested end-to-end, Apache-2.0.**

name: bun
description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
readme_excerpt: Bun is an all-in-one toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript apps. It ships as a single executable called bun.

name: lobehub
description: 🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.

name: YimMenuV2
description: Experimental menu for GTA 5: Enhanced
readme_excerpt: 1. Download the latest version of FSL from here and place WINMM.dll in your GTA V directory 2. Download YimMenuV2 from GitHub Releases 3. Download an injector, such as Xenos 4. Open Rockstar Launcher, select Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced, go to settings, and disable BattlEye. If you are using Steam or Epic Games, you may have to pass the -nobattleye command line parameter as well 5. Launch GTA V, then use your injector to inject YimMenuV2.dll at the main menu

name: ai-job-search
description: The job search that runs on your machine. AI job application framework built on Claude Code: evaluate postings, tailor CVs, write cover letters, prep interviews. Fork it and own it.
readme_excerpt: An AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate job postings, tailor your CV, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

name: DeepTutor
description: DeepTutor: Lifelong Personalized Tutoring. https://deeptutor.info/.
readme_excerpt: Features · Get Started · Explore · CLI · Ecosystem · Community

name: OfficeCLI
description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
